top_signals.title: How to Save the U.S.-Israeli Alliance
top_signals.summary: If Iran gets a new deal with America, so must Israel.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bollinger Bands creator eyes Bitcoin bear-market end, 'W'-shaped reversal
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin price strength could "break" the entire downtrend if the reversal pattern completed, John Bollinger suggested in light of the BTC rebound.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Iran envoy says friendly nations to get ‘special’ Hormuz fee treatment
top_signals.summary: The initial peace deal stated that ships would transit the strait free of charge for 60 days, but it remains unclear what will be in place after that period.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Claude Fable relaunch disappoints users with nerfed performance
top_signals.summary: Claude Fable, the company's most powerful model, is now available to all users, but early impressions are disappointing, as it appears to be nowhere near the original release. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Commission partially greenlights Spain's sixth payment request for €5.7 billion under NextGenerationEU*
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 03 Jul 2026 Today, the European Commission partially greenlighted Spain's sixth payment request worth €5.7 billion under the Recovery and Resilience Facility, the centrepiece of NextGenerationEU. At the same time, it has greenlighted a payment for two milestones suspended earlier under the fifth payment request.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
